title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
summary_full: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.
summary_public: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.
